metadata.name: Inquire About Lost Item at Attraction

description: A visitor calls a theme park's guest services to report a lost camera.

nodes.task_description: Gather details from the visitor: description of the camera, where and when it was likely lost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all necessary information to search for the item.

nodes.task_description: Search the park's lost and found database for a matching item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent searches the database but finds no matching camera at this time.

nodes.task_description: Create a lost item report with the visitor's contact information and advise them that they will be contacted if it is found.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully files a report and provides the visitor with a reference number.
